name: Stale Position Cleanup
description: Daily (8 PM ET, Mon-Fri): Removes tickers from the short-term watchlist that haven't triggered a setup in 7 days or whose setups have expired. Keeps the watchlist fresh and focused on active opportunities.

parameters.content:
## Stale Position Cleanup

Required: postgresApi, neo4j
Removes stale short-term candidates (>7 days old)
Keeps watchlist fresh

parameters.query: UPDATE watchlists SET status = 'expired' WHERE strategy = 'short_term' AND status = 'active' AND added_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND ticker NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ticker FROM alerts WHERE strategy = 'short_term' AND alert_type LIKE 'trade_setup_%' AND triggered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days');
MATCH (c:Company)-[r:IN_WATCHLIST]->(w:Watchlist {name: 'short_term'}) WHERE r.updatedAt < datetime() - duration('P7D') DELETE r;
SELECT COUNT(*) as active_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM watchlists WHERE strategy='short_term' AND status='expired') as expired_count FROM watchlists WHERE strategy='short_term' AND status='active'
